children.heading: Air carrier
children.label: 1 Air carrier
children.text: The term “air carrier” has the meaning such term has under .section 40102 of title 49

children.heading: Coronavirus
children.label: 2 Coronavirus
children.text: The term “coronavirus” means SARS–CoV–2 or another coronavirus with pandemic potential.

children.heading: Covered loss
children.label: 3 Covered loss
children.text: The term “covered loss” includes losses incurred directly or indirectly as a result of coronavirus, as determined by the Secretary.

children.label: B
children.text: a United States business that has not otherwise received adequate economic relief in the form of loans or loan guarantees provided under this Act.

children.label: A
children.text: has the meaning given the term in ; andsection 152 of title 29

children.label: B
children.text: includes any individual employed by an employer subject to the Railway Labor Act ( et seq.).45 U.S.C. 151

children.heading: Equity security; exchange
children.label: 6 Equity security; exchange
children.text: The terms “equity security” and “exchange” have the meanings given the terms in .section 78c(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: a political subdivision of a State, and

children.label: B
children.text: an instrumentality of a municipality, a State, or a political subdivision of a State.

children.heading: National securities exchange
children.label: 8 National securities exchange
children.text: The term “national securities exchange” means an exchange registered as a national securities exchange under .section 78f of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 9 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Treasury, or the designee of the Secretary of the Treasury.

children.label: C
children.text: any of the territories and possessions of the United States;

children.label: D
children.text: any bi-State or multi-State entity; and

children.heading: Aerospace-related businesses critical to maintaining national security
children.label: 11 Aerospace-related businesses critical to maintaining national security
children.text: The term “businesses critical to maintaining national security” means those businesses that manufacture or produce aerospace-related products, civil or defense, including those that design, integrate, assemble, supply, maintain, and repair such products, and other businesses involved in aerospace-related manufacturing or production as further defined by the Secretary, in consultation with the Secretary of Defense and the Secretary of Transportation. For purposes of the preceding sentence, aerospace-related products include, but are not limited to, components, parts, or systems of aircraft, aircraft engines, or appliances for inclusion in an aircraft, aircraft engine, or appliance.
